sentence_reviews.text: Representations are shaped by pulling related examples together and separating unrelated examples.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Supervised Contrastive Learning arXiv abstract says same-class points are pulled together in embedding space while different-class clusters are pushed apart (lines 37-40).
sentence_reviews.notes: The source directly supports the pull-together/push-apart characterization.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Contrastive learning is to connect Self-supervised learning, Embeddings & distributed representations to downstream capabilities including Contrastive and mutual-information objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: SimCLR arXiv abstract discusses contrastive self-supervised representation learning and contrastive loss (lines 41-44); Supervised Contrastive Learning arXiv abstract discusses embedding-space clustering and contrastive losses (lines 37-40).
sentence_reviews.notes: The sources support self-supervised contrastive representation learning and contrastive objectives; mutual information is not directly supported in the inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Contrastive and mutual-information objectives
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: SimCLR arXiv abstract references contrastive loss and prediction tasks (lines 41-44); Supervised Contrastive Learning arXiv abstract references contrastive losses (lines 37-40).
sentence_reviews.notes: Contrastive objectives are supported, but mutual-information objectives are not directly supported by the inspected sources.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: SimCLR arXiv abstract describes contrastive self-supervised learning algorithms and self-supervised representations (lines 41-44).
sentence_reviews.notes: The source directly supports contrastive learning combined with self-supervised learning.

sentence_reviews.text: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Embeddings & distributed representations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: SimCLR arXiv abstract discusses the role of data augmentations, nonlinear transformation, batch size, and training steps (lines 41-44); Supervised Contrastive Learning arXiv abstract discusses label-based embedding clusters (lines 37-40).
sentence_reviews.notes: The sources support dependence on learning setup and embeddings, but not the exact deployment-objective limitation.

sentence_reviews.text: Contrastive learning follows the learning setup expressed by Self-supervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: SimCLR arXiv abstract describes contrastive self-supervised learning (lines 41-44); Supervised Contrastive Learning arXiv abstract notes contrastive learning in self-supervised representation learning (lines 37-40).
sentence_reviews.notes: The connection is directly supported for common use cases, but contrastive learning can also be supervised, so the dependency should remain common.

sentence_reviews.text: Contrastive learning uses Embeddings & distributed representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: SimCLR arXiv abstract discusses learned visual representations and contrastive loss (lines 41-44); Supervised Contrastive Learning arXiv abstract describes pulling/pushing clusters in embedding space (lines 37-40).
sentence_reviews.notes: The inspected evidence directly supports embeddings/representations as central to contrastive learning.

sentence_reviews.text: Contrastive learning uses Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: SimCLR arXiv abstract (lines 41-44); Supervised Contrastive Learning arXiv abstract (lines 37-40).
sentence_reviews.notes: The inspected abstracts do not support distributions, uncertainty, or beliefs as a dependency.

sentence_reviews.text: Contrastive learning can also be used in supervised or weakly supervised settings when labels define the positive and negative pairs.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Supervised Contrastive Learning arXiv abstract extends self-supervised batch contrastive learning to the fully supervised setting and uses label information to pull same-class points together and push different classes apart (lines 37-40).
sentence_reviews.notes: The source directly supports supervised contrastive learning using labels for positive/negative structure.

edge_reviews.notes: Self-supervised contrastive learning is well supported, and common strength is appropriate because supervised variants also exist.
Embedding/representation space is central in the inspected evidence, supporting a core uses edge.
No inspected evidence supports distributions/uncertainty as a dependency for this node.
The supervised-contrastive source directly supports supervised use, and common strength is appropriate.
